name: Biome Australia Limited
analysis: BIO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 58% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2650, stop A$0.2376, target A$0.2950 (1.09:1) — then trail it.
